title: botrychium ternatum var. erosum
intro: Botrychium ternatum var. erosum, also known as the three-forked lady fern or Eros's fern, is a rare and unique species of the genus Botrychium, which is a type of fern characterized by its delicate and lacy fronds. Traditionally, the plant is believed to possess medicinal properties due to its high content of ferulic acid, which has been shown to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Consuming or applying preparations made from this plant is believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Botrychium ternatum var. erosum is often prepared as a tincture or decoction, and it can also be used topically in the form of a poultice or salve.
